text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 107 

 DSPNSNG_PRVDR_ID 

LABEL: Dispensing Provider Identification Number 

DESCRIPTION: The state-specific provider ID of the provider who actually dispensed the prescription medication. 

SHORT NAME: DSPNSNG_PRVDR_ID 

LONG NAME: DSPNSNG_PRVDR_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 30 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX header 

VALUES: Valid values are supplied by the state
